infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NutriLens uses the camera to scan barcodes and take photos of your meals for nutrition analysis—for example, to estimate calories and nutrients from a picture of your food.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NutriLens needs access to your photo library so you can choose meal photos for nutrition analysis—for example, selecting a picture of your food to estimate calories and nutrients.

plugins.motionPermission: NutriLens uses Motion & Fitness data from your device to read your daily step count, show it on the home screen, and estimate calories burned from walking—for example, displaying “8,240 steps today” with an approximate kcal value next to your nutrition tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: NutriLens uses the camera to scan barcodes and take photos of your meals for nutrition analysis—for example, to estimate calories and nutrients from a picture of your food.
